goal: is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound) = forall(x0: Domain) { domain.contains(x0) implies f(x0) <= bound }

p.c: function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2 } = is_upper_bound_on[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound)
function[T0, T1: PartialOrder] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) <= x2 } = is_upper_bound_on[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) } }
not is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound) or forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) <= bound } = true
(forall(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not f(x0) <= bound) or not is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound) })
(forall(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not f(x0) <= bound) })
not forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) <= bound } or is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound)
is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or f(x0) <= bound } = true)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not f(x0) <= bound) })
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not f(x0) <= bound) }(point)
not point ∈ domain or f(point) <= bound

goal: is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound) = forall(x0: Domain) { domain.contains(x0) implies bound <= f(x0) }

p.c: function[T0, T2: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T2, x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1 <= x2(x3) } = is_lower_bound_on[T0, T2](x0, x2, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, bound, f)
function[T0, T1: PartialOrder] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T1, x2: T0 -> T1) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1 <= x2(x3) } = is_lower_bound_on[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) } }
not is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound) or forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or bound <= f(x0) } = true
(forall(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not bound <= f(x0)) or not is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound) })
(forall(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not bound <= f(x0)) })
not forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or bound <= f(x0) } or is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound)
is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, bound)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not x0 ∈ domain or bound <= f(x0) } = true)
(forall(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not bound <= f(x0)) })
function(x0: Domain) { not (x0 ∈ domain and not bound <= f(x0)) }(point)
not point ∈ domain or bound <= f(point)
function[T0, T3: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T3) { (x1 ∈ x0 and is_upper_bound_on[T0, T3](x0, x2, x2(x1))) = attains_maximum_at[T0, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, point, f)
function[T0, T1: PartialOrder] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1) { (x1 ∈ x0 and is_upper_bound_on[T0, T1](x0, x2, x2(x1))) = attains_maximum_at[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) } }
not attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, f, point) or (point ∈ domain and is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, f(point)))

not is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, f(point)) or not point ∈ domain or attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, f, point)
function[T0, T3: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T3) { (x1 ∈ x0 and is_lower_bound_on[T0, T3](x0, x2, x2(x1))) = attains_minimum_at[T0, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, point, f)

goal: exists(k0: Domain) { attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { attains_maximum_at[T0, T1](x0, x1, k0) } = attains_maximum_on[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, f)
not exists(k0: Domain) { attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) } or attains_maximum_on[Domain, Value](domain, f)

goal: exists(k0: Value) { is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) }

p.c: is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, f(point))
function(x0: Value) { not is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, x0) }(f(point))
exists(k0: Value) { is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) }
let w0: Value satisfy { is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, w0) }
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1](x0: Set[T1], x1: T1 -> T0) { exists(k0: T0) { is_upper_bound_on[T1, T0](x0, x1, k0) } = is_bounded_above_on[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Value, Domain](domain, f)
not exists(k0: Value) { is_upper_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) } or is_bounded_above_on[Domain, Value](domain, f)

goal: exists(k0: Domain) { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { attains_minimum_at[T0, T1](x0, x1, k0) } = attains_minimum_on[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, f)
not exists(k0: Domain) { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) } or attains_minimum_on[Domain, Value](domain, f)

goal: exists(k0: Value) { is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) }

p.c: is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, f(point))
function(x0: Value) { not is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, x0) }(f(point))

function[T0: PartialOrder, T1](x0: Set[T1], x1: T1 -> T0) { exists(k0: T0) { is_lower_bound_on[T1, T0](x0, x1, k0) } = is_bounded_below_on[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Value, Domain](domain, f)
not exists(k0: Value) { is_lower_bound_on[Domain, Value](domain, f, k0) } or is_bounded_below_on[Domain, Value](domain, f)

goal: subset.subset(superset) = forall(x0: Domain) { subset.contains(x0) implies superset.contains(x0) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Domain](subset, superset)
